title: Warning: No SAT model available for cell  ... ($adff).
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

The following Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  input        clock,
  input        arst,
  output [9:0] _tmp16
);
  reg [9:0] state_9;
  wire [10:0] _GEN_0 = state_9 + 10'h1;
  assign _tmp16 = state_9;
  always @(posedge clock or posedge arst) begin
    if (arst) begin
      state_9 <= 10'h0;
    end else begin
      state_9 <= _GEN_0[9:0];
    end
  end
endmodule
```

```bash
yosys -q -p "
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top1
  proc
  memory
  flatten top1
  hierarchy -top top1
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top2
  proc
  memory
  flatten top2
  equiv_make top1 top2 equiv
  hierarchy -top equiv
  clean -purge
  equiv_simple -short -undef
  equiv_induct
  equiv_status -assert
"
```

Produces this error:
```
Warning: No SAT model available for cell $procdff$3_gold ($adff).
Warning: No SAT model available for cell $procdff$6_gate ($adff).
ERROR: Found 10 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'.
```

`Yosys 0.9+4008 (git sha1 192601385, clang 11.0.1 -fPIC -Os)`

## Expected behavior

to be equivalent with itself

## Actual behavior

not equivalent to itself
code_blocks:
yosys -q -p "
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top1
  proc
  memory
  flatten top1
  hierarchy -top top1
  read_verilog top_mod.v
  rename top_mod top2
  proc
  memory
  flatten top2
  equiv_make top1 top2 equiv
  hierarchy -top equiv
  clean -purge
  equiv_simple -short -undef
  equiv_induct
  equiv_status -assert
"

Warning: No SAT model available for cell $procdff$3_gold ($adff).
Warning: No SAT model available for cell $procdff$6_gate ($adff).
ERROR: Found 10 unproven $equiv cells in 'equiv_status -assert'.
